flags.description: Master toggle for enrollment create. Off = POST returns 503.
Off = every state transition endpoint returns 503. Emergency-only.
Off = ActivateConfirmedEnrollmentsJob no-ops. Enrollments stay in confirmed state.
Off = PromoteWaitlistedEnrollmentsJob no-ops. Waitlist stays frozen until re-enabled.
Off = ExpireExpiredProvisionalEnrollmentsJob no-ops. Expired enrollments accumulate.
Off = ReconcileEnrollmentTeamMemberInvariantJob no-ops. Atomicity drift accumulates until re-enabled — dangerous.
